topics.notes: This is a high-value existing-page opportunity with strong search demand, clear intent, and a page already positioned as the Research cornerstone. The proposal stays within the approved template and preserves canonical claims, so it is suitable for human review as an update rather than a new page. Prior run `2026-05-12-research-gsc-opportunity-llm-approved-intake` is `closed`; keep this topic in monitoring unless new evidence materially changes the opportunity.

The update can be made without blurring cluster role separation.
